deadlines.label: Application deadline — Oct 12–Nov 14 2026 testing window
deadlines.note: Application period 1 Jun–15 Jul. No exceptions or extensions. Canadian candidates apply via the NEB, which may have its own earlier deadline.

name: RCVS Statutory Membership Examination 2027

deadlines.label: Annual exam application deadline
deadlines.note: Declaration of intention to sit can be submitted any time (valid to end of September) and must be done before applying. Written exams held in March; May re-sits; OSCE later in the year.

_source: https://www.rcvs.org.uk/faqs/how-can-i-apply-to-sit-the-examination/ — annual deadline is 14 January; verified 8 Jul 2026

name: RCVS Advanced Practitioner status — 2026 application window

deadlines.label: Application window closes (October 2026 — exact day TBC)
deadlines.note: Window opened March 2026. VERIFY exact closing date on the RCVS page before publishing — only 'closes in October 2026' is confirmed.

name: VIRMP 2027 — Internship & Residency Match

deadlines.label: Applicant sign-in opens for the 2027 Match
deadlines.note: Create/renew your account and start the application packet; reference letters take weeks to chase.

deadlines.label: Program descriptions finalised
deadlines.note: Program listings cannot change after this date — good moment to review the full list.

deadlines.label: Application deadline — 9:00 pm EST
deadlines.note: Strongly enforced. Laboratory animal medicine residencies have earlier deadlines (typically Nov–Dec) — check individual listings.

_source: https://www.virmp.org/ and /Home/Applicants — verified 8 Jul 2026. Applicant rank-order-list deadline (mid-Feb 2027) not yet confirmed — add when published.
